Headline: #86 Narragansett/Ridgeland Temporary Northbound Reroute near Lake/Lombard
ShortDescription: Northbound 86 Narragansett/Ridgeland buses are temporarily rerouted via Lake, Humphrey, South Boulevard, Ridgeland and Lake: near Lake/Lombard.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Northbound #86 Narragansett/Ridgeland buses are temporarily rerouted via Lake, Humphrey, South Boulevard, Ridgeland and Lake: due to, street blockage near Lake/Lombard.

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
